channel.title: The Haunted Bicycle
channel.description: The engineering journal of the Skill Weaver project: architecture decisions, debugging stories, adaptive assessment research, and deployment lessons.

item.title: Pulling One Thread in Someone Else's Codebase
item.description: What a scoring bug taught us about reading code we didn't write, calmly.
item.author: Bricen

item.title: Three Nginx Files Enter a Server
item.description: A deployment postmortem in three configuration files, one of which was lying to us.
item.author: Jesus

item.title: Why the Bicycle Is Haunted
item.description: A manifesto for naming a system after something with a mind of its own.
item.author: Manju
